response.justification: The role requires 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows, strong SQL Server/Oracle experience, and fixed-income or investment-banking domain knowledge. The candidate's only C++ exposure is roughly six months at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI) plus a university thesis project — far short of the depth and recency required. Their career is overwhelmingly web/full-stack work in DLang, Node.js, and TypeScript, with no SQL Server/Oracle and no capital-markets or fixed-income domain experience (the RIDE Capital role was a JS/GraphQL fintech product, not a C++ trading system). The mandatory skills are essentially unmet.
strengths: Broad, long software engineering career with strong testing/TDD and CI/CD discipline
Some genuine low-level C/C++ background (National Instruments, audio thesis)
Brief fintech-adjacent exposure at RIDE Capital
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, none on Windows recently
No SQL Server or Oracle; database work is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed-income, derivatives, or investment-banking C++ domain experience
